overrides.reason: Scored in five consecutive European Cup finals (1956-1960) including a hat-trick in the 1960 final; Ballon d'Or 1957 & 1959. The formula cannot see pre-dataset domestic dominance.
overrides.author_note: game-design tuning from public award records (Ballon d'Or archive)

overrides.reason: Four goals in the 1960 final, the most ever in a European Cup final; Olympic champion and consensus all-time great finisher.
overrides.author_note: game-design tuning from public match records

overrides.reason: Two goals in the 1962 final against Real Madrid aged 20; Ballon d'Or 1965.
overrides.author_note: game-design tuning from public award records

overrides.reason: Both goals in the 1972 final; Ballon d'Or 1971, 1973, 1974; axis of the Total Football Ajax that won three straight European Cups.
overrides.author_note: game-design tuning from public award records

overrides.reason: Captain of three consecutive European Cup winners (1974-1976); Ballon d'Or 1972 & 1976; invented the modern libero role.
overrides.author_note: game-design tuning from public award records

overrides.reason: Two goals in the 1974 final replay; Ballon d'Or 1970; the highest goals-per-game ratio of any major European competition striker.
overrides.author_note: game-design tuning from public match records

overrides.reason: Anchor of the 4-0 demolition of Barcelona in the 1994 final; played in eight European finals across 1989-2007.
overrides.author_note: game-design tuning from public match records

overrides.reason: Match-winning volley in the 2002 final, widely rated the greatest Champions League final goal; Ballon d'Or 1998.
overrides.author_note: game-design tuning from public match records

overrides.reason: Two goals in the 2017 final; all-time Champions League top scorer; Ballon d'Or 2016 & 2017.
overrides.author_note: game-design tuning from public award records

overrides.reason: Scored in the 2011 final and was man of the match; Ballon d'Or 2009-2012; peak of the 2011 Barcelona side often called the best club team ever.
overrides.author_note: game-design tuning from public award records
